name: Italian Ziti Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the Italian sausage in a 4-quart saucepan and remove, draining off fat.
2. Melt butter and cook mushrooms, pepper, and onion until tender but not browned.
3. Blend flour into the vegetable mixture. Gradually stir in milk. Cook, stirring constantly over medium-low heat until the mixture begins to boil.
4. Boil and stir 1 minute. Add 1 1/2 cups shredded Cheddar cheese, Parmesan cheese, and pepper; blend until cheeses are melted and the mixture is smooth.
5. Cook ziti according to package directions and drain.
6. Stir hot cooked ziti and sausage into the vegetable cheese mixture. Pour into a buttered 2-quart casserole.
7. Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup shredded Cheddar cheese.
8. Bake covered at 350°F for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
